decision_reason: low-risk, narrow single-file mechanical change (widen _next_unenriched selection using existing ready_goal_ids), no schema/structural work; claude_sonnet is 100% verified on low-risk per insights.md and keeps external-CLI quota free for the medium-risk packet

packet.objective: Widen JIT enrichment goal selection from earliest-by-position to earliest-by-position-among-ready (per approved plan Phase 2)

decision_reason: new DB migration + new repository port/adapter/fake is medium-risk structural work touching schema; codex is 89% verified on medium-risk per insights.md and is the preferred lane for multi-file structural implementation

packet.objective: Add goal_leases table (migration), GoalLeaseRepository port + SQLite adapter + in-memory fake, wired into UnitOfWork and env_factory dual-backend fixtures (per approved plan Phase 3, schema+repository slice only -- NOT the worker/dispatcher split)

command: Read TASK.md at the root of this repo and implement exactly what it specifies. Follow every instruction in it precisely, including the verification commands and the done-criteria. Delete TASK.md when finished.

decision_reason: narrow single-file concurrency primitive (fcntl.flock scoped per cycle_id), well-specified, disjoint concern/path from the concurrently-running codex phase3 packet (infra/db vs infra/git) and the already-merged phase1/phase2 domain files; codex is busy (max_concurrent=1) on phase3, claude_sonnet has headroom (max_concurrent=3, currently 1 running)

packet.objective: Add a per-cycle-id fcntl.flock around GitBranchWorkspace._merge_goal_sync so concurrent goal-merge calls for the same cycle serialize at the worktree-checkout step (git refuses two worktrees on the same branch) while different cycles proceed unblocked
